The Beginning

Born from Reverence
for the Handmade

SplendyCraft began with a simple idea — to give timeless Indian craftsmanship a modern luxury identity. In a world filled with mass-produced products, we wanted to create a space where artistry, heritage, and elegance could still feel personal and meaningful.

Inspired by the beauty of traditional handicrafts and the sophistication of modern aesthetics, SplendyCraft was built to curate handcrafted collections that blend culture with contemporary luxury.

The People Behind It

Every Thread,
Every Brushstroke,
A Human Touch

Each object we curate has been touched by human hands for hundreds of hours. We travel across the country — from temple towns to blue-glazed workshops — to bring you pieces crafted with genuine devotion.

Every piece we showcase reflects craftsmanship, detail, and the stories of skilled artisans whose art deserves to be experienced beyond local markets. We ensure artisans are paid fairly, credited for their work, and given the platform their mastery deserves.

Our Identity

More Than a Store —
A Celebration of
Handcrafted Luxury

SplendyCraft is more than a store — it is a celebration of handcrafted luxury. From handcrafted décor to premium lifestyle collections, our vision is to create a brand that celebrates elegance, authenticity, and timeless design.

Our focus is on creating an aesthetic experience through carefully selected handcrafted collections designed to elevate spaces and lifestyles.

Curated Luxury Handcrafted Collections Timeless Décor & Lifestyle Pieces Artisanal Elegance for Modern Living Crafted to Elevate Everyday Luxury
The Reason

Why SplendyCraft?

SplendyCraft was created with a vision to bring timeless Indian craftsmanship into modern luxury living. We curate elegant handcrafted collections that celebrate heritage, artistry, and sophistication — from traditional décor pieces to premium lifestyle products.

Our focus is not just on products, but on creating an aesthetic experience through carefully selected handcrafted collections designed to elevate spaces and lifestyles.

"At SplendyCraft, craftsmanship meets luxury."
Artisan-Direct

Sourced directly from master craftspeople across India — authentic provenance guaranteed.

Heritage Art Forms

Celebrating Tanjore painting, Blue Pottery, hand-painted ceramics, silk weaving, and more.

Luxury Living

Pieces designed to elevate every space they inhabit — where art meets daily life.

Handpicked for You

Our Collections

Be Part of Something Meaningful

Support Us...

We are a young startup with a passionate mission — to preserve India's most extraordinary craft traditions and bring them to those who truly appreciate beauty and artisanship. Every purchase, every referral, every conversation you have about us helps sustain the artisans who pour their lives into their craft.

If you believe in what we are building — a brand that places heritage, honesty, and handcraft above everything — we would love to hear from you. Whether you're a collector, collaborator, retailer, or simply someone who cares, your support makes this possible.

Simple & Easy

How to Order

01
Visit Our Instagram Page

Head over to our Instagram page @splendycraft to explore our full collection of handcrafted pieces.

02
Choose Your Product

Browse through our posts and pick any product or products that catch your eye. Each piece is a unique work of art crafted by skilled artisans.

03
Share the Post to Us

Share the post of the product you want directly to our Instagram page. This lets us know exactly which piece you have chosen.

04
Complete the Payment

We will reach out to you with the payment details. Complete the payment procedure securely and conveniently through our guided process.

05
Receive Your Order

Sit back and relax. Your handcrafted piece will be carefully packed and delivered to your doorstep within a few days.

Have questions at any step? Simply write to us at splendycraft@gmail.com and we will guide you through.
